data.title: Jumex® to Spotlight New Jumex® GoMix™ Gummies and Odwalla® Juices at NAMA Show 2026
data.description: Discover groundbreaking fruit innovation and exciting flavor encounters at Booth #1550 in LOS ANGELES, with Jumex® showcasing its expertise in real fruit and a wide range of beverages and snacks at the NAMA Show 2026 from April 22 to 24. This event will be held at the Los Angeles Convention Center, offering attendees the chance to explore Jumex®'s growing selection of products firsthand.

data.title: LayerZero reveals Kelp setup led to $290M exploit, as Aave loss dispute grows, raises concerns on protocol covering.
data.description: LayerZero claimed that the DVN configuration of Kelp led to the exploit amounting to $290 million, prompting investors to raise concerns about which protocol would address the deficit.

data.title: Mastercard aims to settle card payments using stablecoins like SoFiUSD to expedite transaction clearing and connect finance with blockchain.
data.description: A new initiative is being tested by Mastercard, aimed at expediting card transaction clearance by utilizing stablecoin settlement with SoFiUSD. This move signifies a step towards the convergence of traditional finance practices with blockchain technology. The test is expected to provide insights into the potential benefits for the industry.

data.title: Nestimate and Nuveen Partner to Deliver Objective Target-Date Fund Evaluation Tool to Retirement Industry
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, Nestimate, a retirement plan due diligence platform, has partnered with Nuveen, TIAA’s asset manager, to offer Nestimate's Target-date Fund Fit Analysis to retirement plan advisors across the country. This collaboration allows advisors to access the Nestimate platform for free through Nuveen, enabling them to assess retirement plan investment menus for plan sponsor clients in an unbiased manner. This partnership aims to provide valuable insights to advisors and facilitate better decision-making in retirement planning.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 20, 2026
data.description: Several companies are expected to report their quarterly earnings before the bell including SmartFinancial (SMBK), projected to report $0.79 per share on revenue of $53.55 million. Capital City Bank Group (CCBG) is likely to report $0.84 per share on revenue of $63.35 million, while Bank of Hawaii (BOH) is expected to report $1.34 per share on revenue of $193.57 million. Investar Holding (ISTR) is projected to report $0.68 per share on revenue of $36.48 million and Ennis (EBF) is likely to report $0.38 per share on revenue of $95.10 million. On the other hand, Cleveland-Cliffs (CLF) is estimated to report a quarterly loss of $0.41 per share on revenue of $4.81 billion, and Nano X Imaging (NNOX) is estimated to report a loss of $0.15 per share on revenue of $3.99 million. These reports can provide valuable insights into the financial health and performance of these companies.

data.title: QuidelOrtho Corporation Completes Acquisition of LEX Diagnostics
data.description: QuidelOrtho achieves a significant milestone in their growth strategy by introducing a new ultra-fast PCR platform for point-of-care molecular diagnostics. The platform is designed to provide results in under ten minutes, significantly reducing turnaround time. This launch expands QuidelOrtho's portfolio in this market, and the company anticipates starting the commercial rollout of the LEX VELO in the United States soon.

data.title: Alaska Air Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Alaska Air Group, Inc. (NYSE: ALK) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 20. Analysts are predicting a loss of $1.55 per share for the Seattle-based company, compared to a loss of 77 cents per share in the same quarter last year. The consensus forecast for quarterly revenue stands at $3.29 billion, up from $3.14 billion reported last year. Alaska Airlines recently named Lindsay-Rae McIntyre as its chief people officer. The company's stock price rose by 10.3% to $45.40 on Friday. For more information, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga to access the latest analyst ratings and sort by various criteria.

data.title: Arclin Firepoint® Named a Green Builder Media 2026 Sustainable Product of the Year
data.description: In Alpharetta, Georgia, on April 20, 2026, Arclin's Firepoint® fire-resistant sheathing received the Sustainable Product of the Year award from Green Builder Media for the second year in a row. This recognition highlights the product's innovation, real-world performance, and measurable impact.

data.title: Domino's® Delivers a Draft Week Win: All Pizza is 50% Off
data.description: From April 20-26 in ANN ARBOR, Michigan, Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) is offering a special discount on menu-priced pizzas ordered online, giving customers the chance to enjoy a 50% savings. This deal coincides with the upcoming football draft and is available on all pizza varieties during the specified period.

data.title: BNB Plus Corp. Announces Review of Strategic Alternatives to Maximize Shareholder Value
data.description: BNB Plus Corp. (Nasdaq: BNBX), a digital asset treasury company specializing in Binance's BNB token, shared plans for a strategic review to enhance shareholder value. The Board of Directors approved exploring options such as mergers or reverse mergers to achieve this objective. Additionally, the company updated the status of its Nasdaq listing. The strategic review aims to optimize the treasury value and maximize benefits for stakeholders. Stay tuned for further developments in this process.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility Improves Annual Adjusted EBITDA Guidance by Approximately 40% While Maintaining 20% to 30% Annual Revenue Growth Guidance
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) shared updated guidance for 2026, revealing a revised Adjusted EBITDA loss estimate ranging from $25 million to $30 million. This marks a notable 40% enhancement compared to the previous projection of $40 million to $50 million. The improvement is credited to the integration of the Company's SurfOSTM software, which has resulted in cost reduction and expedited deployment throughout its operations. Surf Air Mobility has also reiterated its commitment to achieving its strategic goals.

data.title: Accelsius Announces General Availability of NeuCool® IR150 and Launches NeuCool HyperStart Program at Data Center World 2026
data.description: Accelsius, a prominent company specializing in two-phase, direct-to-chip liquid cooling for AI and high-performance computing, revealed the launch of their latest product, the NeuCool® IR150. This innovative rack-level cooling solution is the first of its kind in the industry, incorporating a two-phase Coolant Distribution Unit (CDU), 42U of IT rack space, and integrated liquid and vapor manifolds within a single 800mm-wide enclosure. The NeuCool® IR150 provides a capacity of up to 150kW and has been completely redesigned to enhance performance and efficiency.

data.title: Agi to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: In São Paulo, Agi Inc (NYSE: AGBK), a prominent provider of specialized financial services in Brazil, has revealed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, post-market closure. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for 5:00pm ET (6:00pm BRT) on the same day. Access the live conference call via Zoom webinar using ID: 833 2928 3838 and Password: 010443. Stay tuned for more updates.

data.title: The Plumbing Sales Coach expands offerings with new Blueprint training program
data.description: A recent development aims to assist plumbing businesses in enhancing their efficiency and customer satisfaction amidst anticipated labor deficits. On April 20, 2026, in Indianapolis, The Plumbing Sales Coach, a firm offering coaching and training services to service plumbing experts, announced an expansion initiative. This endeavor seeks to address potential labor shortages in the industry, enabling companies to improve their performance.

data.title: UTAH BUILDER HAMLET HOMES, FROM SEASON SIX OF ROCK THE BLOCK, REFLECTS ON THE NEW SEASON SEVEN EPISODES ON HGTV
data.description: Four families have recently moved into the homes featured in the sixth season of Rock The Block in Grantsville, Utah. The popular home renovation show premiered its seventh season in Las Vegas, Nevada last week. Rock The Block is HGTV's top-rated program and has gained significant popularity over the years. data.title: EnrollHere Inc. Announces Investment from Aquiline to Advance Technology for Medicare Advantage Distribution
data.description: An investment has been made to enhance enrollment quality, compliance, and lifetime value using an AI-powered system for insurance distribution. EnrollHere Inc., based in New York and Pinehurst, N.C., announced on April 20, 2026, its platform and system of record for insurance will be bolstered with the investment. This move aims to improve overall enrollment standards and ensure compliance, while also increasing the long-term value generated for stakeholders.
